command: Panel Creator command spec consumed the persona-dream one-panel route and delegated to read-only panel review. This command-spec proof does not generate image media or call a provider.
Panel Reviewer must independently inspect creator output or fail closed when required panel artifacts are absent.
Panel Reviewer posts a schema-valid visual review handoff with WebGPT/vision source evidence, or an explicit missing-evidence blocker.
Panel Reviewer emits PASS, NEEDS_CHANGES, BLOCKED, or INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE as a tau.agent_handoff.v1 response.
Panel Reviewer command spec consumed the creator handoff and delegated to the persona-dream panel repair gate. This command-spec proof does not fabricate a WebGPT visual verdict.
The repair gate owns terminal one-panel repair truth and must fail closed without creator, reviewer, loop, and receipt evidence.
Persona Dream Panel Repair Gate posts a panel repair receipt with provider_eligibility=false unless every required subgate passes.
Persona Dream Panel Repair Gate emits terminal PASS or explicit blocker evidence.

Persona Dream Panel Repair Gate reached the explicit first blocker: no one-panel work-order, panel creator receipt, visual review receipt, or loop final receipt was attached. provider_eligibility remains false.
Human or the outer Persona-Dream harness must provide a concrete one-panel work order and receipts before Tau may claim a panel repair transaction.
Attach one panel work order plus creator, generation, visual review, no-overlay, and loop final receipts; or authorize a bounded live panel repair attempt.
Human supplies the missing panel work-order evidence or routes to a live persona-dream repair attempt.
